name: Kraft 3-step Cranberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX cream cheese, sugar and vanilla with electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
2. Add eggs; mix just until blended. Do not overbeat after adding eggs.
3. Stir in 1/2 cup of the cranberries and peel.
4. SPRAY 9-inch pie plate with no stick cooking spray; sprinkle bottom with crumbs.
5. POUR cream cheese mixture into prepared pie plate. Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup cranberries.
6. BAKE at 325°F for 45 minutes or until center is almost set. Cool. Refrigerate 3 hours or overnight.
Makes 10 servings.
Per Slice: Calories 180 Fat 2.5g
Prep: 10min | bake 45min | chill 3 to 24hrs
